TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 12, Aki Aleong, squliq na Bunge'. mintzyuwaw nya Aki Aleong hiya ga m' engi, hiya ga m' onggaku. t'aring sa kawas 1956, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors Aki Aleong hagan Trinidad and Tobago,Amirika na semong mqwas ru puqing pciyaw.
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, aki aleoŇč, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. mintzjuwaw nja aki aleoŇč ńßija …£a m Ē eŇči, ńßija …£a m Ē oŇč…£aku. t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē aki aleoŇč ńßa…£an trini*a* an* toő≤a…£o,amirika na s~…ēemoŇč mqwas~…ē ru puqiŇč p ¶~ ®ijaw.
